subcodes.first_line: O pure and sanctified leaf! The favors of God, even as a boundless ocean, surge in waves over His servants and handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه طیبه زکیه الطاف حق چون دریای بی پایان موج بر سر عباد و اماء میزند و
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @divine emanation is ceaseless; eternal, @praise and encouragement
